name: python3-cyberfusion-common
documentation:
# python3-cyberfusion-common

Common utilities.

These utilities are mostly used by Cyberfusion libraries, but are also useful standalone.

# Install

## PyPI

Run the following command to install the package from PyPI:

    pip3 install python3-cyberfusion-common

## Debian

Run the following commands to build a Debian package:

    mk-build-deps -i -t 'apt -o Debug::pkgProblemResolver=yes --no-install-recommends -y'
    dpkg-buildpackage -us -uc

# Configure

No configuration is supported.

# Usage

See code.

modules.name: cyberfusion.Common.exceptions
documentation: Exceptions.

classes.name: cyberfusion.Common.exceptions.ExecutableNotFound
documentation: Raise exception when executable not found.

modules.name: cyberfusion.Common
documentation: Helper classes for Cyberfusion scripts.

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.find_executable
documentation:
Find absolute path of executable.

Use this function when the executable must exist. This function raises an
exception if it does not.

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.try_find_executable
documentation:
Find absolute path of executable.

Use this function when the executable may be absent. This function returns
None if it is.

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.download_from_url
documentation:
Download from URL.

Large files are supported due to use of chunking and streaming.

Inspired by https://stackoverflow.com/a/16696317/19535769

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.get_tmp_file
documentation: Create tmp file and return path.

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.get_hostname
documentation: Get hostname.

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.get_domain_is_wildcard
documentation: Determine if domain is wildcard.

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.get_today_timestamp
documentation: Get UNIX timestamp from the first second of today.

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.generate_random_string
documentation: Generate random string.

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.hash_string_mariadb
documentation: Hash string with SHA-1 by MariaDB standards.

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.convert_bytes_gib
documentation: Convert bytes to GiB.

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.get_md5_hash
documentation: Get Base64 encoded 128-bit MD5 digest of file.

classes.name: cyberfusion.Common.EmailAddresses
documentation: Cyberfusion email addresses.

modules.name: cyberfusion.Common.Config
documentation: Helper for handling config files.

classes.name: cyberfusion.Common.Config.CyberfusionConfig

methods.name: cyberfusion.Common.Config.CyberfusionConfig.__init__
documentation: Set attributes.

methods.name: cyberfusion.Common.Config.CyberfusionConfig.path
documentation: Set config file path.

methods.name: cyberfusion.Common.Config.CyberfusionConfig.config
documentation: Read config.

methods.name: cyberfusion.Common.Config.CyberfusionConfig.get
documentation: Retrieve config option.
Abstract ConfigParser implementation for use in scripts.

modules.name: cyberfusion.Common.Filesystem
documentation: Helper for handling filesystem.

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.Filesystem.get_filesystem
documentation:
Get filesystem that absolute path is on.

Returns the earliest filesystem. E.g. if '/a/b/c' is passed, and both '/a' and
'/b' are mountpoints, '/b' is returned.

Does not resolve symlinks, so the filesystem of the symlink itself is looked
up.

Inspired by https://stackoverflow.com/a/4453715/3837431

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.Filesystem.get_filesystem_type
documentation: Get type of filesystem.

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.Filesystem.get_directory_size
documentation: Get size of directory.

classes.name: cyberfusion.Common.Filesystem.FilesystemType

class_variables.name: cyberfusion.Common.Filesystem.FilesystemType.EXT2
documentation: Usually for /boot

class_variables.name: cyberfusion.Common.Filesystem.FilesystemType.OVERLAY
documentation: Usually for Docker

class_variables.name: cyberfusion.Common.Filesystem.FilesystemType.APFS
documentation: Development on macOS

Filesystem types.

We don't expect any other filesystems than the ones in this Enum under normal
circumstances. This Enum prevents you from having to write filesystem types
by name manually; it's not a complete list of all possibilities.

modules.name: cyberfusion.Common.FilesystemComparison
documentation: Helper for comparing filesystem objects.

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.FilesystemComparison._get_recursive_dircmps
documentation:
Get dircmp object for every subdirectory.

Subdirectories are only returned for directories that are in the left and
right directories.

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.FilesystemComparison.get_different_files_in_directories
documentation:
Get files with same name in both directories but with different contents or attributes.

Files which are present in subdirectories that only exist in either the left
or right directories are not returned. Use the 'get_directories_only_in_*_directory'
functions to get subdirectories that are in either the left or right directories.
This ensures that this function does not return individual files in whole new
directories.

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.FilesystemComparison.get_files_only_in_left_directory
documentation:
Get files which are only present in left directory.

Files which are present in subdirectories that only exist in either the left
or right directories are not returned. Use the 'get_directories_only_in_*_directory'
functions to get subdirectories that are in either the left or right directories.
This ensures that this function does not return individual files in whole new
directories.

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.FilesystemComparison.get_files_only_in_right_directory
documentation:
Get files which are only present in right directory.

Files which are present in subdirectories that only exist in either the left
or right directories are not returned. Use the 'get_directories_only_in_*_directory'
functions to get subdirectories that are in either the left or right directories.
This ensures that this function does not return individual files in whole new
directories.

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.FilesystemComparison.get_directories_only_in_left_directory
documentation: Get directories which are only present in left directory.

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.FilesystemComparison.get_directories_only_in_right_directory
documentation: Get directories which are only present in right directory.

functions.name: cyberfusion.Common.FilesystemComparison.get_nested_directory_structure
documentation: Convert list of paths to nested dict.
